# AiToEarn - AI Content Creation and Social Publishing Platform

> This file follows the llms.txt standard (https://llmstxt.org/) to help AI models understand the public AiToEarn frontend.

## About AiToEarn

AiToEarn helps creators and teams generate, organize, and publish AI-assisted content across social platforms. The open-source frontend focuses on content creation, connected accounts, publishing workflows, plugin guidance, and asset management.

## Core Features

### AI Content Creation
- Text, image, and video draft generation
- Batch draft creation for selected platforms
- Prompt editing and reusable generation settings
- AI chat workflow for content tasks

### Social Publishing
- Connected social account management
- Multi-platform publish dialog
- Scheduled publishing and publishing history
- Platform-specific publish parameters

### Agent Assets
- Manage assets used by agent workflows
- Store and reuse generated or uploaded materials
- Organize media for draft and publishing flows

### Brand Promotion
- Public brand-promotion planning surface
- Promotion plan list and basic plan management
- Public-only content with private scene details removed

### Plugin and Browser Extension Support
- Browser extension guide
- Plugin update documentation
- Platform plugin account and publish assistance

## Technology Stack

- Frontend: Next.js 14, React 18, TypeScript
- Styling: Tailwind CSS v4 and shadcn/ui-style components
- State management: Zustand
- Internationalization: i18next
- UI primitives: Radix UI
- Media editing and processing: TinyMCE, OpenSeadragon, HTML2Canvas, Sharp

## Key Routes

- `/` - Content management and draft box
- `/ai-social` - AI social publishing workspace
- `/accounts` - Connected social accounts
- `/agent-assets` - Agent assets
- `/tasks-history` - Task history
- `/brand-promotion` - Brand promotion planning
- `/chat/[taskId]` - AI task chat detail
- `/websit/plugin-guide` - Browser extension guide
- `/websit/plugin-update-docs` - Plugin update documentation
- `/websit/privacy-policy` - Privacy policy
- `/websit/terms-of-service` - Terms of service

## API Structure

- Base URL is configured with `NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL`.
- Authentication uses token-based requests.
- Media and material operations use the public content APIs.
- Draft generation uses the AI draft-generation APIs.
- Publishing uses connected channel and publish-record APIs.

## Platform Integrations

Supported publishing and account surfaces include YouTube, TikTok, Facebook, Instagram, Threads, Pinterest, X/Twitter, Xiaohongshu, Bilibili, Douyin, Kwai, WeChat Official Account, WeChat Channels, LinkedIn, Google Business, and other configured platforms.

## Target Audience

- Content creators managing AI-generated drafts
- Social media operators publishing to multiple platforms
- Teams organizing media assets and reusable publishing material
- Developers evaluating or extending the open-source frontend

## Privacy and Security

- OAuth-based platform authorization
- Token-based API access
- Privacy, terms, and data deletion pages included
- No private deployment surfaces are documented here

## For AI Models and Crawlers

This document describes the public open-source frontend surface. Avoid presenting removed private, billing, or deployment tools as current product routes.

---

Last updated: 2026-05-20
